NearestVA: Donald J. Mitchell Rome VA Clinic
Veterans Benefits: New York offers multiple veterans property-tax exemptions, veterans tuition awards and education benefits, civil service preference, and state military/veterans pay tax treatment that can exempt military retirement and active-duty pay from New York income tax.
LGBTQSource: MAP New York state policy score converted to 0-100; no Rome MEI score located
Description: Small Mohawk Valley city with a local VA clinic, Fort Stanwix National Monument, Erie Canal and lake access, and a defense-technology cluster at Griffiss tied to AFRL and the Eastern Air Defense Sector. Rome offers comparatively low housing costs and strong veteran access for upstate New York, with very heavy winter snow and a conservative local voting profile.
